name: Lake Rotorua
description: 罗托鲁瓦湖是新西兰北岛第二大湖，形成于约20万年前的火山喷发后塌陷的火山口。湖中Mokoia岛是新西兰最著名的爱情故事——Hinemoa与Tutanekai的传说发生地。湖水因硫磺含量高呈现奇妙的蓝绿色，湖畔地热活动频繁，蒸汽袅袅。
descriptionEn: The North Island's second largest lake, formed when a magma chamber collapsed after a massive eruption around 200,000 years ago. Mokoia Island in the centre is the setting for New Zealand's most famous love story of Hinemoa and Tutanekai. The water has a magical green-blue colouration due to high sulphur content.
highlights: 新西兰北岛第二大湖，碧蓝的火山口湖
湖畔温泉蒸汽缭绕的独特景观
可参加导览游览Mokoia岛和Hinemoa温泉池
